name: Honeycomb
description: Automated signature creation using honeypots. Tool: http://www.icir.org/christian/honeycomb/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #505 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Honeycomb output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Honeycomb output file to parse instead of running it live.
